compiled_state.title: STATUS:blocked QUESTIONS JSON displayed raw to user instead of formatted
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: When /dso:implementation-plan returns STATUS:blocked with a QUESTIONS JSON array (the output protocol for sprint orchestrator parsing), the sprint orchestrator should parse the JSON and present the questions in a human-readable format (separated by kind: blocking vs defaultable, numbered, with clear text). Instead, the raw STATUS:blocked QUESTIONS:[{...}] line is displayed verbatim to the user as an unformatted JSON blob. The sprint skill (Phase 2 Step 2d-collect) defines the expected presentation format but the orchestrator printed the STATUS line directly instead of parsing it.

comments.body: Re-opened: initial fix applied without bot-psychologist investigation. These are LLM-behavioral bugs (skill/prompt behavioral gaps) that require proper bot-psychologist diagnosis per fix-bug SKILL.md dual-signal detection. The text changes committed are a first-pass fix — bot-psychologist should validate the behavioral diagnosis and confirm the fix addresses the actual root cause.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Behavioral assertion (Step 5 LLM exemption): After fix, sprint SKILL.md MUST contain parsing instruction for STATUS:blocked QUESTIONS JSON. Grep for 'parse.*QUESTIONS.*JSON' or 'format.*blocked.*question' in sprint SKILL.md.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
